data.narrative:
OroraTech is a Series B space & aerospace company that has raised €38M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 5 private-market comparables in the same sector and stage, ranging from Series B to Series C, alongside 5 public Space & Aerospace tickers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) for contextual reference.

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. The median valuation across the five private comparables—Sierra Space ($8.0B, Series C), Cowboy Space Corporation ($2.0B, Series B), Varda Space Industries ($1.5B, Series C), Aalyria ($1.3B, Series B), and Skyryse ($1.1B, Series C)—yields $1.5B. This reflects the broad dispersion in the sector, with a range of $1.1B to $8.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (median 25.8x across the sector) cannot be applied without OroraTech's disclosed revenue figure, which is not available.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.3B to $1.7B, centered on a $1.5B median. Key uncertainties include the concentration of valuation inputs on a single method, the stage heterogeneity within the peer set (two Series C versus two Series B), and the absence of revenue-based anchoring. Given OroraTech's stage within the Series B cohort, positions toward the lower bound of the range merit consideration.
